title: Listening for Daily Objects
description: Listen for room and object words.

sections.label: Pointing word
sections.placeholder: Type the word that means this...

blocks.title: Complete the Transcript
blocks.text: First fill in the missing words: ___, ___, ___. Listen for room items and pointing words.

items.statement: The speaker describes things at home.
items.explanation: Room and object words are the target.

items.statement: The speaker asks about travel tickets.
items.explanation: Travel is not the topic here.
